CustomField.description: The Esc % is set during schedule generation and applies to all rates within the schedule. Any update to the Esc % automatically reflects in all related rates. Similarly, the Esc % will update if a rate within the schedule changes, but only if there is a single rate in the schedule and no changes are made to key parameters like Rate Based On or Rate Unit.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Esc % is set during schedule generation and applies to all rates within the schedule. Any update to the Esc % automatically reflects in all related rates. Similarly, the Esc % will update if a rate within the schedule changes, but only if there is a single rate in the schedule and no changes are made to key parameters like Rate Based On or Rate Unit.
CustomField.label: Esc %
